artifacts.caption: A woman in a school uniform holding a sword.

vision_result.caption: A woman in a school uniform holding a sword.
vision_result.detailed_caption: The image shows a woman in a school uniform holding a sword, standing against a dark background. She is wearing a white and blue dress with a high neckline and long sleeves, and her hair is pulled back in a ponytail. Her eyes are closed and her hands are clasped in front of her. She has a determined expression on her face, as if she is ready to take on any challenge.

selected_strategy.title: Keep current plan with minimal adjustments
selected_strategy.reason: Self verification passed or does not require replanning.
selected_strategy.expected_effect: Avoids unnecessary prompt drift while preserving current strengths.

candidate_strategies.title: Increase identity preservation
candidate_strategies.reason: Reflection suggests subject or caption fidelity may be weak.
candidate_strategies.expected_effect: Keeps character identity, outfit, and accessories more stable.

candidate_strategies.title: Simplify composition and camera
candidate_strategies.reason: Layout or composition mismatch can reduce image-text alignment.
candidate_strategies.expected_effect: Improves framing, camera clarity, and subject placement.
candidate_strategies.risk: May make the image less dynamic.

candidate_strategies.title: Strengthen lighting coherence
candidate_strategies.reason: Lighting intent may not be visible enough in the generated image.
candidate_strategies.expected_effect: Makes mood and contrast easier for generation to follow.
candidate_strategies.risk: Could overpower character details if overemphasized.

candidate_strategies.title: Balance style against identity
candidate_strategies.reason: Requested style should support the subject rather than replace it.
candidate_strategies.expected_effect: Preserves style keywords while reducing identity drift.
candidate_strategies.risk: May produce a less stylized image.
